change_operations.details: Modify the activity inside the existing pre-test loop so that it writes only data.evaluation and no longer writes data.evaluation_extra.

change_operations.target_location: At the end of the existing loop body, after the exclusive block containing Lookup Partner Banks and before the loop condition is re-evaluated
change_operations.details: Insert a new activity named 'Determine whether additional due diligence is required' with write: data.evaluation_extra.

compliance_degree.reason: The condition data.evaluation_extra is no longer produced by the same activity that is required to follow it. If the new decision activity sets data.evaluation_extra to true, the pre-test loop repeats and 'conduct due diligence study' eventually executes in the next iteration.

resolution_context_consistency.reason: The changes are localized to the due diligence loop and do not affect the annual report activities required by R1 or the direct termination after data.risk required by R3.

change_cost.reason: Only one activity write set is changed and one small decision activity is inserted inside the existing loop.

structural_quality_impact.reason: The existing loop structure is preserved. The added activity clarifies responsibility for deciding whether additional due diligence is required and avoids the self-triggering condition problem.

change_location.reason: The modification is located in the due diligence section within the branch for respondent banks without an existing record, before the later annual report and account-opening steps.

change_operations.target: loop with condition data.evaluation_extra containing conduct due diligence study
change_operations.details: Change the loop mode from pre_test to post_test while keeping the loop condition data.evaluation_extra and the existing loop body unchanged.

compliance_degree.reason: With a post-test loop, 'conduct due diligence study' executes before the loop condition is checked for repetition. If data.evaluation_extra becomes true, the loop continues and the activity executes again afterwards.

resolution_context_consistency.reason: The strategy does not modify the annual report part of the process and does not affect the data.risk branch where terminate directly follows the risk condition.

change_cost.reason: Only the loop mode is changed; no new activities or branches are introduced.

structural_quality_impact.reason: The process remains structurally simple, but the semantics change because due diligence will execute at least once even when data.evaluation_extra is initially false.

change_location.reason: The change is made in the due diligence loop in the middle part of the process.

change_operations.target_location: Immediately before the existing loop with condition data.evaluation_extra
change_operations.details: Insert a new activity named 'Determine need for extra due diligence' with write: data.evaluation_extra.
Modify the activity so that it writes data.evaluation only and no longer writes data.evaluation_extra.

Replace the loop with an exclusive conditional block: one branch with condition data.evaluation_extra containing 'conduct due diligence study' followed by the existing evaluation/Lookup Partner Banks exclusive block, and one empty branch with condition not data.evaluation_extra.

compliance_degree.reason: The condition data.evaluation_extra is determined before the conditional branch. Whenever it is true, the branch containing 'conduct due diligence study' is selected, so the activity eventually follows the condition.

resolution_context_consistency.reason: The changes remain confined to the due diligence fragment and do not interfere with the annual report activities or the direct terminate behavior after data.risk.

change_cost.reason: This strategy requires inserting an activity, changing the write set of an existing activity, and replacing the loop with a conditional block.

structural_quality_impact.reason: The resulting structure is still sound, but it removes the repeated due diligence behavior of the original loop and therefore changes the process behavior more significantly.

change_location.reason: All operations are applied in the due diligence part of the process before the annual report and account-opening stages.

best_resolution_reason: RS1 is recommended because it fully resolves the violation while preserving the existing pre-test loop behavior. It keeps the due diligence activity responsible for producing the evaluation result and moves the decision about whether more due diligence is required into a separate follow-up activity. This avoids the self-triggering condition problem, has low change cost, maintains structural clarity, and does not affect the already satisfied context requirements R1 and R3.
